title: dodecatheon alpinum
intro: Dodecatheon alpinum, also known as alpine shooting star, is a perennial plant species belonging to the gentian family, characterized by its unique, star-shaped flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory conditions, and providing antioxidant protection. Dodecatheon alpinum is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, with the leaves and roots being used for their medicinal properties.
